let colors = ["red", "green", "blue"]
mut result = ""
mut i = 0
while i < colors.len()
  let item = match colors.get(i) when Some(s) s when None "" end
  if i == 0
    result = item
  else
    result = "#{result}, #{item}"
  end
  i = i + 1
end
